subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O God of the worlds, for having caused me to know Thy Self, and for having given me to drink of the Kawthar of Thy knowledge, and for having shown me the horizon of Thy Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا اله العالم بما عرفتنی نفسک و سقیتنی کوثر عرفانک و اریتنی افق وحیک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
